title: embedder-ceiling probe ($0 / CPU / EVAL-ONLY) — Slice-20 lever pick

hard_subset.definition: non-negative qids whose required docs are NOT all within BM25 top-50 (strict all-of)

measurement.eu7_proxy: 1-bit sign-quant + mean-centering ON, Hamming K=192, f32 rerank, recall@10 vs model's own f32-exact top-10; GATE=frozen POINT >=0.90 (CI reported for transparency)

gte-base.error: IndexError in custom HF modeling (transformers 5.9); non-selectable (no candle encoder), non-fatal

interpretation: Clean pre-registered NEGATIVE. Every measurable candidate IMPROVES eu8 relevance at power (e5-base +0.057 CI-lo, nomic +0.042, bge-base +0.015) but NONE beats the lexically-hard subset (all hard delta CI-lo < 0) — the hard/exploratory axis is granularity/task-structure-bound, not embedder-bound (matches the prior nomic diagnostic surfaced in design consult). Larger models also break 1-bit survivability (bge-base proj_eu7 0.786, e5 0.896 < 0.90) or the CPU budget (nomic). => Slice-20 keeps CLS-corrected bge-small (no swap).

stage_split.stage1_mechanical: DONE — probe_15a_pass verdict + ranking + chosen embedder (this slice).
stage_split.stage2_gap_relative: DEFERRED to after D0b lands — gap-relative 'is any lift enough / surpass' finalization (design §6). D0b is still running its priced parity pass.

tdd.integration_tests: validated under eu-0 CPU venv (byte-identical determinism, cls!=mean)

codex_verdict: CLEAN (round 6, post-fix-6): 'I did not identify a discrete, actionable bug introduced by this patch.' Six review rounds: design consult (Q2/Q3/Q5/Q6 folded) + code r1 (latency/revisions->fix-1) + r2 (Hamming-tie/cache->fix-2) + r3 (test-opt-in->fix-3) + full-run failure (gte)->fix-4 resilience + r4 (offline/cache-identity->fix-5) + r5 (proj_eu7 CI->fix-6) + r6 CLEAN. All [P2], no [P1].

gate_results.footprint: OFFLINE-BUILD/EVAL-ONLY, $0, CPU-only, no GPU, no airlock, no engine/Rust change

env_notes: embedding via dev/research/eu-0/.venv (torch-cpu+transformers); einops added to THAT venv only (canonical .venv verified clean)
canonical .venv lacks torch by design; pure-logic tests run there with FATHOMDB_TESTS_NO_REBUILD=1
raw codex/full-run TUI logs gitignored; concise review-record committed
next_step_for_orchestrator: land on main after D0b lands (cherry-pick this branch; do NOT merge now to avoid racing D0b); feed the chosen embedder (CLS-corrected bge-small — NO SWAP) into Slice 20. Slice-20 implication: the embedder is NOT the lever for the hard/exploratory axis; the dense lever buys eu8 relevance but not the hard subset, so the remaining Mem0 gap (once D0b quantifies it) must be closed by a non-embedder lever (PRF and/or D2 fielded enrichment per 15b) or accepted. Stage-2 surpass finalization pends the D0b gap.
